nodes.name: AtlasStudio Foundation
nodes.summary: Established the AtlasStudio repository, vision, workflow, agent roles, and work order format.

nodes.name: Last Sword Protocol Story Reset
nodes.summary: Resets the Last Sword Protocol story foundation for the overworld-first JRPG direction.

nodes.name: Home Region Overworld Design
nodes.summary: Designs the starting home region (Ashford Vale) as an overworld-first JRPG region.

nodes.name: Agent Assignment System
nodes.summary: Defines how work orders are matched and assigned to agents.

nodes.name: RPG Maker Bridge Design
nodes.summary: Designs the bridge that translates engine-independent design into RPG Maker MZ implementation work.

nodes.name: Atlas Graph Architecture
nodes.summary: Designs the Atlas Graph shared memory layer and seeds the initial graph files.

nodes.name: Atlas Graph Validation and Query Tools
nodes.summary: Implements the first stdlib Atlas Graph validation and query scripts.

nodes.name: Studio Doctor
nodes.summary: Builds the first AtlasStudio diagnostic command and readable Studio Health report.

nodes.name: Graph Diff Engine
nodes.summary: Implements the Atlas Graph diff engine that explains changes between two graph states.

nodes.name: Work Order Planner
nodes.summary: Implements Planning Engine v1 for deterministic, evidence-backed work recommendations.

nodes.name: Capability-Based Orchestration Engine
nodes.summary: Designs the capability-based orchestration model that matches work to providers via required capabilities rather than named agents, per ADR-0007 (supersedes the named-agent Agent Scheduler concept).

nodes.name: Canon Linter
nodes.summary: Implements a rule-driven deterministic canon design QA linter.

nodes.name: Immutable Formatting Guard
nodes.summary: Implements a check-only guard that warns about suspicious broad graph JSON formatting churn.

nodes.name: First Playable Hour Master Plan
nodes.summary: Designs the master production blueprint (milestone, roadmap, implementation plan, dependency map, work breakdown) for the first playable hour of The Last Sword Protocol.

nodes.name: Engine Bridge Foundation
nodes.summary: Implements the read-only RPG Maker MZ bridge handoff foundation for First Playable Hour work packages.

nodes.name: Implementation Target Readiness Audit
nodes.summary: Audits TheLastSwordProtocol-Game read-only to determine RPG Maker MZ implementation readiness and bridge-safe first targets.

nodes.name: Implementation Readiness Repository Audit
nodes.summary: Read-only audit report for TheLastSwordProtocol-Game repository structure, RPG Maker MZ readiness, ownership boundaries, and first implementation targets.

nodes.name: Atlas Graph Validator
nodes.summary: Validates Atlas Graph JSON files for parseability, required fields, unique IDs, edge references, and source paths.

nodes.name: Atlas Graph Query
nodes.summary: Queries Atlas Graph JSON files for nodes, relationships, paths, work-order impact, statuses, orphans, and missing sources.

nodes.name: Studio Doctor
nodes.summary: Reports AtlasStudio project health across graph integrity, orphans, missing sources, work orders, and implementation readiness.

nodes.name: Atlas Graph Diff Engine
nodes.summary: Compares Atlas Graph states between Git refs, commits, or directories and reports added, removed, and changed facts by scope.

nodes.name: Planning Engine
nodes.summary: Recommends next work orders from graph state, work-order metadata, Studio Doctor signals, and Canon Linter findings without creating work automatically.

nodes.name: Canon Linter
nodes.summary: Runs rule-driven deterministic design QA checks over Atlas Graph canon facts without modifying canon.

nodes.name: Immutable Formatting Guard
nodes.summary: Checks graph JSON diffs for formatting-only changes, semantic changes, and suspicious broad formatting churn without rewriting files.

nodes.name: RPG Maker Bridge Handoff Generator
nodes.summary: Generates read-only RPG Maker MZ implementation handoff checklists from AtlasStudio work packages, bridge docs, and graph data.

nodes.name: GPT
nodes.summary: Story and creative systems agent role.

nodes.name: Claude Code
nodes.summary: Senior software architect and implementation agent role.

nodes.name: Codex
nodes.summary: Implementation and local verification agent role.

nodes.name: GitHub Copilot
nodes.summary: Local coding assistant agent role for boilerplate, small edits, and in-editor support.

nodes.name: Ollama / Local Models
nodes.summary: Low-cost local support agent role for review, critique, consistency checks, and summaries.

nodes.name: Human
nodes.summary: Human creator, reviewer, and final approver.

nodes.name: OpenAI
nodes.summary: Provider platform for the GPT and Codex agent roles.

nodes.name: Anthropic
nodes.summary: Provider platform for the Claude Code agent role.

nodes.name: GitHub Copilot
nodes.summary: Provider platform for the GitHub Copilot agent role.

nodes.name: Ollama
nodes.summary: Local model provider platform for the Ollama agent role.
